parse.title: The Collector
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Hexoptics C44;Yun Tal Wildarrows;Stormrazor;Essence Reaver;Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes = 
* {{sbc|Death}} deals {{tip|raw damage}}, and thus will not trigger [[spell effects]].
* {{sbc|Death}} is not blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* {{sbc|Death}} execution effect cannot be triggered by the bonus damage dealt by {{tip|Energized}} effects{{bug}}, 0 damage instances, and basic attacks that are parried.
* {{sbc|Death}} is special cased to not affect {{ci|Kled}} while he is {{ai|Skaarl the Cowardly Lizard|Kled|mounted}}.
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* {{sbc|Death}} and {{sbc|Taxes}} references the idiom {{w|Death_and_taxes_(idiom)|death and taxes}}.
* When {{sbc|Death}} triggers, it displays the damage it deals as '''999'''. This number is inaccurate from the actual amount of damage being dealt and exists purely for visual flavor.
** If triggered on multiple damage instances, this number will be multiplied by the number of instances applied by the source effect.{{bug|2}}
** If the user of the item is {{ci|Jhin}}, it instead displays '''4444''' (which may also subsequently suffer from the above interaction).
* The item was referenced by the [[Teamfight Tactics]] item {{TFTi|Gold Collector}}.
[[File:Bilgewater Crest icon.png|link=Bilgewater#Trivia|100px|center]]
|quotes = 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
The Collector VFX.png|Item VFX
</gallery>
|sfx = 
;Passive Triggered
* {{sm2|Collector passive SFX.ogg}} Execute SFX
* {{sm2|Collector passive SFX 2.ogg}} Gold Bounty SFX
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V14.23]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2950}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|525}} from {{g|475}}.

;[[V14.20]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|475}} = {{g|2950}}. 
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|500}} = {{g|3400}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 50 from 60.

;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3400}} from {{g|3200}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|500}} from {{g|300}}.
* Lethality reduced to 10 from 12.

;[[V14.11]]
* Lethality reduced to 12 from 15.

;[[V14.10]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|300}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|625}} = {{g|3100}}.
* Attack damage increased to 60 from 55.
* Critical strike chance increased to 25% from 20%.
* Lethality reduced to 15 from 16.

;[[V14.3]]
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.

;[[V14.1#January 12th Hotfix|V14.1]] - January 12th Hotfix
* Total cost increased to {{g|3100}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|625}} from {{g|525}}.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|525}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 20% critical strike chance, 16 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Death:}} If you deal {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} damage that would leave a champion below {{as|5% of their '''maximum''' health}}, {{tip|execute}} them.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Taxes:}} Champion kills grant you an additional {{g|25}}.
** Limited to 1 '''The Collector'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|425}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 20% critical strike chance, 18 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Death and Taxes:}} If you deal {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} damage that would leave a champion below {{as|5% of their '''maximum''' health}}, {{tip|execute}} them. Champion kills grant you an additional {{g|25}}.
** Limited to 1 '''The Collector'''.

;[[V13.10]]
* Lethality increased to 18 from 12.

;[[V12.21]]
* Updated icon.

;[[V12.19]]
* Execute damage is now displayed as ''4444'' instead of ''999'' if the user is {{ci|Jhin}}.

;[[V11.3]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Damage dealt from items now properly triggers Death and Taxes.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Death and Taxes now properly triggers against enemy champions with {{ii|Death's Dance}}.

;[[V11.1]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} Can no longer be triggered by {{nie|Energized}}.
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} Can no longer be triggered by attacks that deal 0 damage {{tt|post-mitigation|actually more like post-preapply but this wiki does not currently document the entire damage event order}}.

;[[V10.25]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Execute now only triggers against champions, instead of all enemies except epic monsters and structures.

;[[V10.23#November 12th Hotfix|V10.23]] - November 12th Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Execute no longer procs off {{bi|Aspect of the Dragon|Aspect of the Dragon's}} execute, creating a loop against invulnerable targets that immediately killed them when the invulnerability wore off.

;[[V10.23]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|425}} = {{g|3000}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 20% critical strike chance, 12 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Death and Taxes:}} If you deal damage that would leave an enemy below {{as|5% of their '''maximum''' health}}, execute them. Champion kills grant you an additional {{g|25}}.
* Limited to 1 '''The Collector'''.
}}
